title: Conformance
description: Conformance fixture contract for proving an operation adapter behaves as expected.

operation_id.description: Operation contract exercised by this fixture.

kind.description: Adapter family used to run the fixture command.

items.description: One argv token in the command template.

command_template.description: Command argv template executed for each fixture.

cwd.description: Working directory used when executing the adapter.

adapter.description: Process adapter used to invoke the operation under test.

additionalProperties.description: File content keyed by fixture-relative path.

files.description: Files to materialize before running this fixture.

items.description: One entry in the fixtures list.

fixtures.description: Fixture roots and files used as conformance inputs.

schema.description: Schema that should validate stdout when the output is JSON.

allow_empty.description: Whether empty stdout is acceptable for text-mode refusal cases.

items.description: One entry in the field assertions list.

field_assertions.description: Field-level stdout assertions evaluated after parsing.

stdout.description: Expected standard-output format and field assertions.

allow_non_empty.description: Whether non-empty stderr is acceptable for this fixture.

items.description: Text that must appear in stderr.

contains.description: Required stderr substrings for refusal or usage-error fixtures.

stderr.description: Policy for stderr emitted by the adapter command.

allowed_write_paths.description: Fixture or repo paths the command may write.

required_paths.description: Paths that must exist after command execution.

forbidden_paths.description: Paths that must not be created or modified.

filesystem.description: Filesystem expectations after the adapter command runs.

run_twice.description: Whether to run the command twice against the fixture.

idempotency.description: Repeated-run behavior expected from the adapter.

no_writes_outside_repo_root.description: Whether writes outside the repository root are forbidden.

expectations.description: Expected process, stream, filesystem, idempotency, and safety results.

items.description: One path segment in the parsed output field selector.

path.description: Path to the parsed output field under test.

field_assertion.description: Reusable assertion against a parsed output field.

items.description: One path in a filesystem expectation list.

path_list.description: Reusable list of fixture or repository paths.
